title: Investigate and fix temporal-worker.service restart flakiness

log.message: Created from Congress #66 verdict on: [idea]: temporal-worker.service restarted 4x in last 24h — possible flakiness (GitHub issue: https:/

Source verdict: Four restarts in 24 hours is a symptom, not a diagnosis — and treating it as an "idea" for congress debate is misclassifying it. This is an operational issue: check the journal logs, identify whether ...

Investigation complete. NRestarts=0. Today's restarts = intentional deploys. Real bug found and already fixed: OnceReminderWorkflow was using datetime.now() instead of workflow.now() (fixed in cbcf363). No current flakiness. GitHub issue #57 closed.
